engine.title: Web Engine
engine.description: A lightweight 2D game engine for the browser. Includes a fixed/variable game loop, canvas management, asset utilities, and per-frame input state for keyboard and pointer.

physics.title: Starweb Physics
physics.description: SAT and circle collision detection for the browser.

tween.title: Starweb Tween
tween.description: Frame-driven tween manager with easing for the browser.

audio.title: Starweb Audio
audio.description: Web Audio API playback, volume, and sound management for the browser.
